metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_4855
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 6:"cLTD treatment induced a significant decrease in GluA1 intensity within the synaptic areas both upon EGFP and Rabaptin-5 wt overexpression but not in Rabaptin-5 S407A expressing neurons (Figure 6A,B). Our data thus provide evidence that phosphorylation of Rabaptin-5 at serine 407 regulates basal and activity-induced AMPAR endocytosis most probably downstream of PKD."

Author summary of presented data; "PKD is activated downstream of NMDA and AMPA receptor signaling and promotes AMPAR endocytosis probably via regulating Rab5 activity through Rabaptin-5". Experimental description: M&M: "Primary cultures of embryonic hippocampal cells were prepared from CD1 mice on embryonic day E17.5-E18.5."

"EGFP-Rabaptin-5 wild type and EGFP-Rabaptin-5 S407A25 were kindly provided by Alex Toker, Beth Israel Deaconess Center, Harvard Medical School."
